BRANCH.COMMENT: check challenge details exists or not

INVOKE.NAME: %challengeExecutionRs/periodDurationContinuance% == 'ONGOING'
INVOKE.COMMENT: if challenege duration type is ongoing, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Challenge period duration is ongoing hence cancellation is not possible

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.NAME: %challengeExecutionRs/periodDurationContinuance% == 'CHALLENGELENGTH' || %challengeExecutionRs/periodDurationContinuance% == 'ONGOINGCANCELLABLE'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1101 --- challenge duration type is challengelength/ongoingCancellable

INVOKE.COMMENT: get all challenge periods for the challenge id

LOOP.COMMENT: api call success, change period status for each periods

INVOKE.COMMENT: update challenge period status to cancelled

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: unable to update challenge periods data in DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-1101 update the challengeEffToDate in DB ---

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: unable to update challenge periods data in DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: no challenge execution details found, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: challenge details not found, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: ---VE-1438 Publish Change Event Notification to Async Service ---
